sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71020" key="noo/plhktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νοό-πληκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n71020.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">palsying the mind,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μέθη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.71</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Paul.
